title: Pumpkin Blur, Pixelated and Circular!
description: Makes the pumpkin blur better by making it pixelated, circular, and more transparent.
body:
# Pixelated Circular Pumpkin Blur
This resource pack makes the pumpkin blur overlay more pixelated, transparent, and circular!
> The pack is available for 16:9 and 16:10 aspect ratios, make sure you download the right one, otherwise the pumpkin blur with look stretched.

Preview of the pack on a 16:10 display:
![16:10 Pumpkin Blur Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yf8XssHo/images/b0e5149fc573555072d742300ee3f1cff0dcc4f8.png)

Leave comments about this project on it's [Planet Minecraft Page.](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/circular-pixelated-pumpkin-blur/)
